name: sparql
description: SPARQL query tools for RDF/linked data (Apache Jena, Blazegraph, rdflib)

subcommands.name: query
subcommands.description: Execute a SPARQL query against an endpoint or local file

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: Validate RDF data using SHACL shapes

subcommands.name: load
subcommands.description: Load RDF data into a triplestore

globalOptions.name: --data
globalOptions.description: Path to local RDF data file

globalOptions.name: --output
globalOptions.description: Output format (json, xml, csv, tsv, turtle)

examples: rsparql --service http://dbpedia.org/sparql --query 'SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a dbo:Country } LIMIT 10'
